prose.voice: The founder — earnest, capable, building something real (Grantwell, in the book).
prose.lore: The human end of the crossing: the founder who receives the Chief of Agents' delivered work.
prose.rules: Forked from the 'get what you deserve' book's Maya. Render in this universe's warm editorial register with her identity, wardrobe and signatures exact: rust blazer, lanyard, laptop under arm. Pass reference/maya/master.png as the identity anchor on every render. A fictional composite, NOT a real person (no realPerson dossier / approval gate).
